agentEditor_lowMedHigh: Must be low, medium, or high
agent_changesNextSession: Changes take effect on next session start.
agent_created: Agent created. Changes take effect on next session start.

agent_desc: Manage agent definitions that Claude uses to delegate specialized tasks.

agent_noPluginAgentsDesc: Install plugins that include agent definitions.
agentsPanel_selectHint: Select an agent to see its details.
agent_saved: Agent saved. Changes take effect on next session start.
agents_statuslineDesc: Agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting.
appUpdate_checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
appUpdate_externalOpened: Opened the download page in your browser. Install the package, then reopen MiWarp.
appUpdate_noticeBody: Open Settings to review the release and choose how to update.
appUpdate_upToDate: You are already on the latest version (v{version}).
updateCenter_restartReady: Update installed. Restart MiWarp to apply.
updateCenter_autoCheckHint: Silently check on startup and every 4 hours. You can always trigger a manual check below.
updateCenter_checkHint: Query the GitHub releases API for the latest version.
updateCenter_fallbackHint: Signed in-app updater is unavailable — opening the GitHub release page instead.
updateCenter_footer: MiWarp updates are signed and verified. CLI tools use their own update mechanisms.
updateCenter_guidanceNative: Run `{command}` in your terminal to update.
updateCenter_guidanceInstaller: Download and install the latest release from the official site.
updateCenter_guidanceRepo: Follow the repository instructions to install or update manually.
updateCenter_installConfirmBody: MiWarp will run an installer for {tool} on your behalf. This may take a minute and requires the appropriate package manager (npm / Homebrew) to be available on your PATH.
updateCenter_updateConfirmBody: MiWarp will run the canonical upgrade command for {tool}. The previous version will be replaced.
auth_cliPriorityHint: When both Login and API Key are present, CLI prioritizes API Key
automationEditor_noSteps: No steps yet. Add a step to get started.
automationEditor_browserRequired: Browser not connected. Please connect a browser first.
stepEditor_noParams: Select a step type to see available parameters
automation_subtitle: Create and manage browser automation scripts
automation_emptyDesc: Create your first automation script to get started
browser_description: Control browsers, automate web tasks, and extract data
chat_addDirSaved:
Directory added: {path}
(will be included on next session start)
chat_addDirUnsupported: add-dir is only supported for Claude agent
chat_clearNotSupported: Clear is only supported in stream mode
chat_clearSessionBusy: Wait for the current response to complete before clearing
chat_contextCleared: Context cleared — messages above are no longer visible to the AI
chat_eventSystemFailed: Event system failed to initialize. Some features may not work.
chat_forkedBanner: This session was forked from a previous conversation.
chat_forkingDesc: Creating a new session from summarized context...
chat_quickAnalyzeHint: Modules, build steps, key files, risks
chat_quickAnalyzePrompt: Analyze the current project structure. Explain the main modules, how to start/build, key files, and potential risks.
chat_quickDailyPrompt: Based on the current project's recent changes, git status, and key files, generate a brief project daily report.
chat_quickFixPrompt: Based on the issue I describe next, first analyze the root cause and propose a fix plan. Wait for my confirmation before making any changes.
chat_startSessionHint: Start a session with an AI coding agent
chat_typeToStartSession: Type a message below to start the session
chat_welcomeSubtitle: Choose a project, describe a task, or continue your last session.
chat_welcomeTitle: What can MiWarp help you build?
cliSync_noSessions: No CLI sessions found for this project
cliSync_usageIncomplete: Some usage data could not be reconstructed
cliSync_usageIncompleteHint: Usage data incomplete — imported from CLI
cmd_desc_compact: Compress the conversation to free up context
cmd_desc_exportChat: Export the conversation as a Markdown file
cmd_desc_exportChatHtml: Export the conversation as a self-contained HTML file with full visual fidelity
cmd_desc_newClaude: Start a new Claude Code conversation
cmd_desc_review: Ask the agent to review recent code changes
cmd_desc_stopRun: Stop the currently running agent process
cmd_desc_switchModel: Change the AI model for the next message
cmd_desc_togglePlan: Switch between plan mode (read-only) and normal mode
cmd_desc_tokenCost: View token usage and cost for current run
cmd_versionContent:
MiWarp Desktop v0.1.0
Tauri v2
Svelte 5

cmd_footerHints: ↑↓ Navigate · Enter Execute · Tab Preview · Ctrl+F Fuzzy · Ctrl+N Semantic
cmd_semanticTooltip: Switch to semantic search mode, describe what you want to do in natural language
contextPanel_noData: Context data will appear after the first turn.

context_highWarning: Context usage is high - consider compacting soon
context_hint: Compact or fork to free up context space
diff_inlineHint: Showing inline changes for this file
diff_noCwd: No working directory set. Open a project first.
doctor_projectSkipped: No project directory — project-scope checks skipped
explorer_emptyStateDesc: Select a file from the sidebar to preview its contents.
explorer_discardConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
explorer_diffTooLarge: Diff too large to render. Open in full diff view.
explorer_saveDisabledInPreview: Switch to Edit mode to save

extensions_noPluginsMarketplace: No plugins available. Check marketplace sources.
extensions_noSkillsExplore: No skills found. Try another keyword or create your own skill.
extensions_noSkillsInstalled: No skills installed yet. Install from Community or create a project skill.

extensions_noWorkspaceForProjectScope: Select a workspace to install project extensions
extensions_scopeLocalDesc: Stored inside the local project when supported

extensions_subtitle: Extend MiWarp with reusable skills, agents, MCP tools, hooks, and installable packages.
extensions_typeGuide_agents: Configure and manage AI coding agents

extensions_typeGuide_plugins: Install full-featured plugin packages from the marketplace
extensions_typeGuide_skills: Teach Claude specialized knowledge and custom behaviors
filesPanel_noPreviewSelected: Select a file above to preview
filesPanel_notLocatable: Cannot locate the corresponding tool call
gitWorktree_not_repo: This directory is not a Git repository.

history_searchSemanticTooltip: Semantic search uses AI to understand meaning — coming soon
history_subtitle: Browse and search your AI coding sessions
history_totalCost: total cost (MiWarp runs & imported CLI sessions only)

hooks_desc: Shell commands and prompts that run at specific lifecycle events

hooks_mcpToolPlaceholder: Name of the tool on that server (e.g. resolve-library-id)
hooks_modelPlaceholder: Model to use for prompt hooks...
hooks_noHooksDesc: Hooks let you run commands or prompts at lifecycle events like PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.
hooks_promptPlaceholder: Prompt to send to the model...
insight_error_default: Unable to generate the session report. Please try again.
insight_generating_desc: MiWarp is organizing the session goals, key decisions, conclusions and shareable content.
visual_block_mermaid_promptTemplate: Explain the "{text}" node in this diagram.
inspector_noSource: Select a file to view source
mcp_clickToSeeDetails: Click a server to see details
mcp_noPackageFound: No package or remote endpoint found for this server
mcp_noServersFound: No servers found. Try a different search term.
mcp_selectServerDetails: Select a server to see details
mcp_useDiscoverTab: Use the Discover tab to find and add MCP servers.
memory_consolidateConfirm: Consolidate memory files? This will merge duplicates and update the index.
memory_discardConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
memory_noProjectFiles: No memory files for this project
memory_setProjectFirst: Set a project working directory first
multiAgent_customPlaceholder: Describe what you want to implement, e.g.: implement user authentication, order management, and payment integration modules
multiAgent_noPresetsDesc: No preset tasks available. Create a custom task to get started.
personal_subtitle: Tell MiWarp who you are so it can speak to you naturally.
personal_consent: Stored locally on this device. The values you save are appended to the system prompt of every session you start, so the model can address you by name and follow your time zone.
personal_previewEmpty: Fill in any field to see what will be injected into the system prompt.
personal_emailHelp: Stored on this device only. Never sent to the model or any third party.
personal_hero_subtitle: Your MiWarp home base — identity, defaults, and recent activity.
personal_section_identity_desc: Used to address you in every chat and to anchor your time zone.
personal_section_ai_desc: Pick the runtime + model that new sessions boot with.
personal_ai_defaultRuntimeDesc: New sessions will start with this CLI runtime.
personal_ai_fallbackModelHelp: Used when the default model is overloaded or unavailable.
personal_section_memory_desc: Memory lives per-project. Skills are shared across all sessions.
personal_memory_workspaceDesc: CLAUDE.md and other memory files are managed from the workspace context panel.
personal_section_sessions_desc: Boot defaults for every new session you create.
personal_sessions_defaultModeDesc: Single = one workspace. Worktree = isolated branch per session.
personal_sessions_autoCommitDesc: Commit worktree changes when a session finishes.
personal_sessions_autoPrDesc: Push the auto-commit branch and open a PR.
personal_sessions_cleanupWorktreeDesc: Remove the worktree directory when you delete the session.
personal_section_providers_desc: API keys and platform credentials you have wired up.
personal_providers_empty: No providers configured yet. Add one from the providers tab in settings.
personal_section_activity_desc: A snapshot of your recent runs and spend.
personal_section_notifications_desc: Pick which events surface as system notifications.
personal_section_display_desc: Language, zoom, and other visual preferences.
personal_section_data_desc: Take your profile with you, or start over.
personal_data_exportDesc: Download a JSON snapshot of your profile. API keys, tokens, and remote hosts are excluded.
personal_data_resetDesc: Wipe every personal field. Other settings are untouched.
personal_data_resetConfirm: Click reset again to confirm. This cannot be undone.
personal_data_resetScopeTitle: Only your personal profile will be reset.
personal_data_resetScopeKept: API keys, platform credentials, remote hosts, webhooks, web server, keybindings, and workspace folders are preserved.
personal_settings_load_failed_desc: We couldn't reach the settings store. Your saved preferences are still on disk — try again, or continue with a blank profile to browse.
fleet_subtitle: Long-running digital employees (CLI sessions) you can stop, monitor, or hand tasks to.
fleet_empty: No employees match the current filters.
workspace_subtitle: Recent sessions and status grouped by working directory.
workspace_empty_desc: Start a chat session in a project folder to see it here.
workspace_load_failed: Workspace sessions could not be loaded.
workspace_select_hint: Select a workspace to view its capsule.
workspace_no_sessions: No sessions in this workspace yet.
attention_queue_subtitle: Tasks and runs that need your decision before work can continue.
onboard_connectProjectDesc: Add a directory to your workspace to enable file operations.
onboard_exploreMarketDesc: Discover more skills and integrations in the Skill Marketplace.
onboard_initDesc: Initialize a CLAUDE.md for a project
onboard_installPluginDesc: The Cowork plugin provides file system access, browser automation, scheduled tasks, and skill execution.
onboard_trySkillDesc: Start with one of these popular skills:
perm_dangerBlocked: Permanent allow not allowed for this tool
planConfirm_autoDesc: Apply file edits automatically while keeping risky actions gated
planConfirm_bypassDesc: Skip tool approval prompts for this run and execute the plan
planConfirm_manualDesc: Review every file edit and command before it runs
planConfirm_missingPlan: The full plan could not be reconstructed. Review the plan above before executing.
planConfirm_subtitle: Claude has finished planning. Choose how to proceed.
plugin_builtinSkillsDesc: MiWarp ships with skills for architecture diagrams, Mermaid charts, mind maps, and other chat workflows. Install them once to use in any session.
plugin_couldNotLoad: Could not load: {items}. Some sections may show incomplete data.
plugin_installFromMarketplace: Install plugins from the Marketplace to see them here.
plugin_installationSuccessNote: {name} has been installed and is ready to use.
plugin_loadFailed: Failed to load plugin data. Check the debug console for details.
plugin_noContentPreview: No SKILL.md content available for preview.
plugin_noMarketplaces: No marketplaces registered. Use the input above to add a marketplace source.
plugin_noPluginsMatch: No plugins match your search criteria. Try a different query or category.
productBootstrap_appliedToast: MiWarp defaults ready: {skills} recommended skills, working style {style}.
plugin_removeMarketplaceMsg: Are you sure you want to remove the "{name}" marketplace?
plugin_scopeProjectNote: Plugin will be installed in the current project directory
plugin_skillRestartHint: Start a new session to use it.
plugin_skillsEmptyDesc: Skills give Claude specialized knowledge and behavior for specific tasks.
plugins_skillDescPlaceholder: Brief description of what this skill does
preview_desktopOnly: The embedded preview is only available in the desktop app.
preview_emptyHint: Start a local dev server, then enter its address above or pick a quick port below.
preview_emptyTitle: Enter a URL to start preview
preview_invalidUrl: Enter a valid http:// or https:// URL
preview_openFailed: Could not connect — make sure a local server is running at this address
preview_remoteUnsupported: File preview is not supported for remote sessions
preview_resetFailed: Failed to clear preview session data
preview_resetSession: Clear this preview's browsing data and reload it
preview_switchHint: Switch back to the Preview tab to continue the current web session.
preview_tooLarge: File too large to preview inline. Open in Explorer.
processVisibility_desc_chat: Keep the transcript focused on the conversation and essential actions.
processVisibility_desc_full: Show thinking, tool activity, context details, and full payloads.
prompt_clipboardUnsupported: File paste is not yet supported on this platform
prompt_noPlatformKey: No API key — configure in Settings
prompt_pendingPermission: Handle the pending approval above first...
prompt_permAutoReadDesc: Auto-approve file edits, ask for others
rewind_checkpointUnavailable: This checkpoint is no longer available.
rewind_degradedToFull: Selective rewind not supported — all files reverted
rewind_noCheckpoints: No checkpoints available in this session.
rewind_noCheckpointsHint: Checkpoints are created when messages are sent. Older sessions may not have them.
rewind_noSession: No active session. Start a conversation first.
rewind_previewDesc: The following files will be reverted:
rewind_previewUnavailable: Preview is not available. You can still proceed with the rewind.
rewind_selectCheckpoint: Select a checkpoint to rewind to:
rewind_sessionBusy: Cannot rewind while the session is running. Wait for the current turn to finish.
rewind_sessionEnded: Session has ended. Rewind is only available during active sessions.
sched_skipNextDesc: Skip the next scheduled fire without executing
schedEditor_contextWarning: This prompt may depend on current conversation context. Scheduled tasks run independently — make sure the prompt is self-contained.
schedEditor_errorInterval: Interval must be at least 1 minute
schedEditor_errorIntervalMax: Interval must be at most 7 days (10080 minutes)
schedEditor_promptHint: This prompt runs without conversation context. Include workspace path, goals, output format, and constraints.
schedEditor_promptPlaceholder: Describe what the agent should do when this task runs...
schedHub_selectExecution: Select an execution to view details
schedTpl_dailyCheck_desc: Review git status, recent commits, and outstanding issues
schedTpl_dailyCheck_prompt: Review the current project state: check git status, recent commits from the past 24 hours, any failing tests, and outstanding TODO comments. Provide a brief summary of what changed and what needs attention.
schedTpl_depCheck_desc: Check for outdated or vulnerable dependencies
schedTpl_depCheck_prompt: Check project dependencies for outdated packages and known security vulnerabilities. Run npm audit or equivalent, check for major version updates, and report any critical issues that need immediate attention.
schedTpl_memoryRefresh_desc: Update project memory files with recent changes
schedTpl_memoryRefresh_prompt: Review recent project changes and update the CLAUDE.md memory files if needed. Ensure project conventions, architecture decisions, and recent patterns are documented for future reference.
schedTpl_weeklyReview_desc: Analyze code quality and suggest improvements
schedTpl_weeklyReview_prompt: Perform a code quality review: analyze recent changes for potential bugs, security issues, and style inconsistencies. Check for proper error handling, unused imports, and suggest refactoring opportunities.
sched_description: Manage automated tasks that run on a schedule
sched_selectTask: Select a task to view details
settings_appearance_nativeWindowGlassDes: Use the OS-level blur (macOS vibrancy / Windows mica) for the entire left sidebar, including the icon rail, search, and session list. Disable to fall back to a solid sidebar.
settings_appearance_nativeWindowMaterial: HeaderView is a lighter blur (default, pairs with the CSS wash). Sidebar is the heavier traditional macOS sidebar material.
settings_appearance_materialHeaderViewDe: Glass blur on the title bar; the sidebar body stays solid.
settings_appearance_materialSidebarDesc: The full left sidebar uses the heavier system sidebar material.
settings_apiTest_partial: Auth OK ({latency}ms) — configure a model for full test
settings_auth_appApiKeyDesc: Managed by App, injected as environment variable when starting CLI.
settings_auth_cliLoginDesc: Stored in macOS Keychain via claude login.
settings_auth_modeAppDesc: App manages authentication (injects env var when starting CLI)
settings_auth_modeCliDesc: CLI manages authentication (Login or configured API Key)
settings_autoCleanupWorktreeDesc: Remove worktree directory when session is deleted
settings_autoCommitDesc: Automatically commit all changes when a worktree session finishes
settings_autoPRDesc: Create a PR automatically after auto-committing
settings_cliConfig_autoCompactDesc: Automatically compact context when approaching limits
settings_cliConfig_codeDiffFooterDesc: Show code diff summary in footer
settings_cliConfig_fastModeDesc: Use faster output (same model, reduced latency)
settings_cliConfig_fileCheckpointsDesc: Create file checkpoints for undo/rewind support
settings_cliConfig_footer: Changes saved to ~/.claude/settings.json. Project overrides (.claude/settings.json) take precedence.
settings_theme_colorDesc: Pick a preset accent theme. Use the advanced editor below to customize individual color tokens.
settings_theme_modeDesc: Choose how the app responds to your system's color preference.
settings_cliConfig_permissionModeDesc: Default permission mode for new sessions
settings_cliConfig_prStatusFooterDesc: Show PR status in footer bar
settings_cliConfig_responseLangDesc: Preferred language for AI responses (e.g. en, zh, ja)
settings_cliConfig_spinnerTipsDesc: Show tips while waiting for responses
settings_cliConfig_thinkingModeDesc: Enable extended thinking for complex problems
settings_cliConfig_verboseDesc: Show detailed tool output and debug info
settings_data_claude_code_history_desc: Export or import Claude Code native history sessions between machines.
settings_data_export_desc: Creates a portable .zip archive of all Claude Code sessions
settings_data_import_desc: Import a previously exported Claude Code history archive
settings_data_readonly_note: Imported sessions are read-only for viewing. They will not auto-resume. Duplicate imports are skipped automatically.
settings_debug_maxEntries: Logs are buffered in memory (max 2000 entries). Open DevTools Console to see live output.
settings_defaultSessionModeDesc: Multi-worktree creates an isolated branch per session. Single-branch shares the workspace branch. Ask will prompt you each time a new branch is created.
settings_doctor_desc: Quick health check for CLI, auth, data directory, and MCP configuration.
settings_general_baseUrlHelp: Leave empty for official Anthropic API. Set for proxies or OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
settings_general_displayLanguageDesc: Choose the language for the app interface
settings_general_extraEnvHelp: Injected into CLI process. Paste KEY=value lines or JSON to bulk-add.
settings_general_mobileAccessDesc: Connect MiWarp Mobile (iOS/Android) to this desktop
settings_general_mobileResetTokenDesc: Disconnects all mobile clients and browser sessions
settings_general_mobileSafetyNotice: Any device on your local network with this link can connect to MiWarp. Only share on trusted networks.
settings_general_modelsHelp: Sonnet is required — if empty, Opus and Haiku are ignored. Opus / Haiku inherit Sonnet when empty. All empty = provider defaults.
settings_general_setupWizardDesc: Re-run the initial setup wizard to reconfigure CLI and authentication.
settings_general_uiZoomDesc: Adjust the overall size of the interface
settings_general_webAccessDesc: Choose who can connect to the web server
settings_general_webAllowedOriginsDesc: Additional CORS origins. Tunnel URL is included automatically.
settings_mobile_disabledHint: Enable the web server above to scan a QR code for mobile pairing.
settings_general_webLanIpFailed: Unable to auto-detect LAN IP — VPN or multiple network adapters may interfere. Enter your computer's IP in the browser manually.
settings_general_webOriginInvalid: Must start with http:// or https://
settings_general_webSaveWarning: Server started, but settings were not saved. Changes may be lost on next launch.
settings_general_webSelfCheckOkDesc: /health responded with status ok, port {port}, bind {bind}.
settings_general_webSelfCheckNetErr: Network error — is the server still running?
settings_general_webSelfCheckDisabled: Start the web server to run a self-check.
settings_general_webTunnelDesc: Paste your tunnel URL (ngrok, cloudflared, etc). CORS and access link update automatically.
settings_general_webTunnelInvalid: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://
settings_local_setupHint_ccr: Run "ccr start" to start the router only (do NOT use "ccr code"). Install: npm i -g @musistudio/claude-code-router
settings_local_setupHint_ccswitch: Open CC Switch → Settings → enable "Proxy Enabled", then select a provider
settings_local_setupHint_ollama: Run "ollama serve" to start the Ollama service
settings_workspaceFolderSortDesc: How workspace folders are arranged in the sidebar conversation list.
settings_workspaceFolderSort_createdAscD: Workspaces with the earliest session first.
settings_workspaceFolderSort_createdDesc: Workspaces with the most recent first session first.
settings_mascotEnabledDesc: Show a pixel-art animated mascot for Claude Code sessions in the sidebar
settings_iconRailEnabledDesc: Show the vertical icon rail on the left with Chat, Teams, Memory, and other shortcuts. When disabled, Settings appears at the bottom-left of the conversation list; when the list is collapsed, it floats at the bottom-left of the window.
settings_iconRailEnabled_onDesc: Keep vertical shortcuts on the left edge.
settings_iconRailEnabled_offDesc: Give the conversation list more horizontal space.
settings_cliAutoSyncEnabledDesc: Periodically pull new messages from Claude Code transcript files into imported MiWarp sessions.
settings_cliAutoSyncIntervalDesc: How often to check for new CLI transcript content (1–120 minutes).
settings_cliAutoSyncImportNewDesc: When enabled, newly discovered CLI sessions are imported automatically. When disabled, only sessions you already imported are kept up to date.
settings_mobile_bindWarningDesc: Switch to LAN mode above to allow mobile connections
settings_mobile_startServer: Start Web Server to Enable Mobile Access
settings_mobile_startServerDesc: Enable the web server above to generate a QR code
settings_notif_desc: Get notified when tasks complete, fail, or need your attention.
settings_notif_enabledDesc: Allow MiWarp to send system notifications
settings_notif_feishuDesc: Send task completion notifications to a Feishu group chat via webhook.
settings_notif_feishuEnabledDesc: Post to Feishu webhook when tasks or scheduled jobs complete
settings_notif_feishuTriggersDesc: Choose which events trigger Feishu notifications. Leave unchecked to notify on all events.
settings_notif_minDurationDesc: Only notify for tasks longer than this
settings_notifications_enableDesc: Allow MiWarp to send system notifications.
settings_sound_a11y: Respects system “Reduce motion”. Sounds are synthesized locally (Sensory UI engine) — no audio files downloaded.
settings_sound_desc: Semantic audio for agent activity — confirmations, errors, and status changes. Not decorative; kept quiet by default.
settings_processVisibilityDesc: Output keeps the chat calm with a single progress hint while tools run. Guided shows compact steps. Developer and Expert show full tool cards.
settings_processVisibility_developerDesc: Show collapsible tool cards, reasoning blocks, and file changes.
settings_processVisibility_expertDesc: Show full tool calls, event traces, and debugging details.
settings_processVisibility_guidedDesc: Compact step rows with status instead of full tool cards. Permissions, questions, and Agent/Task runs keep the full card.
settings_processVisibility_outputDesc: No live cards for routine tools—one progress line while work runs, then the answer. Permissions, questions, and agent runs always show when needed.
settings_remote_cliNotFoundHint: SSH connected but CLI not found. Run this on the remote machine to find the path:
settings_remote_cliNotFoundHint2: Then paste the full path into "Claude CLI Path (remote)" above and test again.
settings_remote_desc: Run Claude Code on remote machines via SSH. Requires key-based authentication.
settings_remote_forwardKeyWarning: API key will be visible in process list (ps) on the remote machine. Consider configuring the key directly in remote ~/.claude/settings.json instead.
settings_remote_sshKeyCopyCmd: Run this command in terminal to install the key:
settings_remote_sshKeyCopyCmd_win: Run this command in PowerShell to install the key:
settings_remote_sshKeyFailed: Connection failed. Run the command above in terminal first, then retry.
settings_remote_sshKeyFailed_win: Connection failed. Run the command above in PowerShell first, then retry.
settings_remote_sshKeyPubMissing: Public key missing. Run this command in terminal to rebuild:
settings_remote_sshKeyPubMissing_win: Public key missing. Run this command in PowerShell to rebuild:
settings_remote_sshKeySuccess: Passwordless login works! Key path has been auto-filled.
settings_shortcuts_appShortcutsDesc: Customize keyboard shortcuts for in-app actions. Click a shortcut to record a new key.
settings_shortcuts_inputAppDesc: Shortcuts that fire while typing in the chat input.
settings_shortcuts_inputFixedDesc: Modifier keys used by the input field. These cannot be changed.
settings_showTokenReportDesc: Display input/output/cache token statistics at the bottom of each chat after a question-answer exchange
settings_sessionIslandAlignmentDesc: Choose where the session status capsule sits at the top of the chat pane.
settings_sessionIslandAlignment_rightDes: Pin the capsule to the top-right of the chat content area; it expands leftward when opened.
settings_visualPerfModeDesc: Controls visual effects like blur and shadows. Auto adapts to your platform.
settings_worktreeTabDesc: Controls what happens when a worktree session completes. The default session mode itself is chosen per new session on the chat welcome screen.
setup_allSetDesc: Everything is configured. Let's start coding.
setup_authDesc: Choose how to authenticate with Claude.
setup_cliNotFoundDesc: Install it in your terminal using one of these commands:
setup_completeBrowser: Complete the authorization in your browser, then return here.
setup_networkFailDesc: Could not reach the API endpoint. This may be due to network restrictions.
setup_networkTipMirror: Use a custom API base URL if you have a mirror endpoint
setup_networkTipProxy: Configure a proxy: set HTTPS_PROXY or HTTP_PROXY environment variable
setup_networkTipVPN: Try using a VPN or switching networks
setup_noKeyNeeded: No key needed for local inference.
setup_setupHint: Or run ./scripts/setup.sh to install everything at once
setup_winRecheckHint: Requires Git for Windows. If still not detected after install, please restart the app and try again
sidebar_batchModeHint: Long-press to multi-select · drag to folder
sidebar_createFolderDesc: Create a new folder to organize your sessions.
sidebar_deleteConfirmMsg: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
sidebar_deleteDesc: Choose how to delete this conversation. Soft delete hides it but keeps data on disk. Hard delete permanently removes all data.
sidebar_deleteFolderDesc: Delete folder "{name}"? Choose whether to keep the sessions (moved to uncategorized) or delete them too.
sidebar_dropToUnfolder: Drop here to remove from folder
sidebar_noConversationsInFolder: No conversations yet, click + to create
sidebar_removeProjectDesc: This project will be removed from sidebar. Data is kept on disk. Use 'Open folder' to add it back.
sidebar_selectProjectBrowse: Select a project to browse files.
sidebar_selectProjectGit: Select a project to view git status.
sidebar_startTeamHint: Start one above to coordinate multiple agents
teamsPage_subtitle: Dispatch a task to a preset team of specialists. Each member runs in parallel and reports back here.
teamsPage_promptPlaceholder: What should the team work on?
teamsPage_noRuns: No team runs yet. Pick a preset above to dispatch your first task.
teamsPage_fullstackDesc: Architect → Frontend → Backend → QA, working the same task in parallel.
teamsPage_reviewDesc: Security, performance, and maintainability reviewers on your code.
teamsPage_researchDesc: Researcher + codebase scanner + solution architect synthesize a plan.
skillEditor_markdownHint: Write your skill content in Markdown format
skillEditor_nameHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
skillSelector_empty: No skills found. Add skills in .claude/skills/ to get started.
skillSources_confirm_delete: Delete this skill source? Cached candidates will be cleared.
skillSources_confirm_replace: Replacing deletes the skill directory with this name under the chosen scope. Continue?
skillSources_need_project_scope: Select a project folder for project-scope install.
skillSources_parser_loose: Loose — infer from title / first paragraph
skillSources_subtitle: Connect external catalogs (Feishu doc URLs MVP). Parsing and installs run locally in the Rust backend.
skillWizard_selectTypeDesc: Choose a category that best describes your skill
skills_deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete /{name}? This will permanently remove the skill and cannot be recovered.
slashMenu_fastDesc: High-speed Opus 4.6. Billed as extra usage at a premium rate.
slashTasks_empty: No background tasks in this session.
slash_desc_addDir: Add a directory to the workspace
slash_desc_btw: Ask a side question without interrupting the current task
slash_desc_clear: Clear conversation history and free up context
slash_desc_color: Set the prompt bar color for this session
slash_desc_compact: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context
slash_desc_copy: Copy Claude's last response to clipboard as markdown
slash_desc_cost: Show the total cost and duration of the current session
slash_desc_doctor: Diagnose and verify your installation and settings
slash_desc_fast: Toggle fast mode on or off
slash_desc_files: List all files currently in context
slash_desc_fork: Create a fork of the current conversation at this point
slash_desc_hooks: Manage hook configurations for tool events
slash_desc_ide: Manage IDE integrations and show status
slash_desc_init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
slash_desc_keybindings: Open or create your keybindings configuration file
slash_desc_listTasks: List background tasks in this session
slash_desc_login: Sign in to your Anthropic account
slash_desc_logout: Sign out from your Anthropic account
slash_desc_loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval
slash_desc_model: Switch the AI model for this session
slash_desc_openPlugins: Manage plugins, skills, MCP servers, and hooks
slash_desc_plan: Enable plan mode or view the current session plan
slash_desc_plugin: Manage plugins, skills, MCP servers, and hooks
slash_desc_preview: Open localhost preview for element picking
slash_desc_ralph: Start a Ralph loop (auto-iterate same prompt until done)
slash_desc_rewind: Rewind files to a previous checkpoint
slash_desc_schedule: Manage scheduled tasks — list, create, run, or edit
slash_desc_scheduleNav: Manage scheduled tasks — list, create, run, or edit
slash_desc_sideQuestion: Ask a side question without interrupting the current task
slash_desc_stats: View usage stats, heatmap, and model breakdown
slash_desc_status: Show Claude Code status and version info
slash_desc_tasks: List background tasks in this session
slash_desc_teamOnboarding: Help teammates ramp on Claude Code with a guide from your usage
slash_desc_vim: Toggle between Vim and Normal editing modes
statusbar_contextTitle: Context usage for the latest turn ({pct}% of {tokens} tokens). The CLI automatically compacts context when approaching the limit.
teamRun_chatDesc: Discuss ideas, risks, and next steps with your team like a group chat.
teamRun_chatEngineNotReady: Team chat engine is not yet enabled. Use @team in Chat to dispatch tasks, or click "Dispatch as Task" below.
teamRun_chatPlaceholder: Discuss plans, risks, or next steps with the team...
teamRun_emptyDesc: No team runs yet. Type @team in Chat, or click "Dispatch to Team" on a message.
teamRun_monitorDesc: View team members, inbox, and underlying state.
teamRun_runsDesc: Dispatch clear tasks to your team, track progress and results.
teamRun_selectRun: Select a team run to view details
teamRun_teamHint: Looks like you want to use a team. Prefix with @team, or click "Dispatch to Team".
team_emptyDesc: Team Monitor shows Claude Code native teams (from ~/.claude/teams/). For group chat, use Team Chat. For task dispatch, use Team Runs.
team_selectTeam: Select a team from the sidebar
theme_importPlaceholder: Paste theme JSON here to import...
theme_resetConfirm: Reset all color customizations for this theme?
toast_openDirFailed: Cannot open directory. Please confirm the path still exists.
toast_permissionChangeFailed: Permission mode change failed — save error
toast_permissionPersistFailed: Mode active for this session only — save failed
toast_remoteHostMissing: Remote host no longer in settings — target reset to local
toolActivity_emptyHint: Claude will appear here after reading files, running commands, or editing code.
usage_firstLoadMessage: First load requires scanning historical session data, please wait... Subsequent loads will be much faster
usage_noUsageData: No usage data yet. Start a session to see usage statistics.
usage_refreshAppScopeHint: App scope auto-refreshes when sessions change
versionMismatch_message: MiWarp detected a frontend/backend version mismatch (UI v{frontend}, backend v{backend}). Please fully quit and reopen the app, or reinstall the latest build.
webfetch_unavailable: Web fetch tool is not available
workspaceContext_noClaudeMd: No CLAUDE.md found. Consider adding project rules.
workspaceContext_noMemory: No project memory yet. Memory will appear here once Claude generates it.
workspaceContext_noWorkspace: Select a workspace to see CLAUDE.md and project memory.
workspaceContext_outputMinimalHint: Workspace details are reduced in Output mode. Switch View to Guided or Developer for full context.
workspace_aliasHint: Only modifies the sidebar display name, not the actual folder.
workspace_aliasPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default name
extensions_desc: Manage skills, MCP servers, hooks, plugins, and agents
extensions_searchAll: Search skills, agents, MCP servers, hooks, plugins...
sidebar_emptySubtitle: Start a new chat to get going.
intent.viewChangesDesc: Show git diff of recent changes
semantic.noResults: No results found for your query
skillWizard_placeholderContent: Describe what this skill does and how it should behave...
skillWizard_helpWriteInstructions: Write the instructions that Claude will follow when this skill is activated.
skillWizard_helpStartDescription: Start with a clear description of the skill's purpose
skillWizard_helpUsageExamples: Include usage examples with expected inputs/outputs
skillWizard_helpNumberedSteps: Break complex tasks into numbered steps
skillWizard_helpErrorHandling: Add error handling and edge case notes
skillWizard_helpRunTest: Run a test to verify your skill works correctly.
skillWizard_createdSuccess: Your skill "{skillName}" has been created successfully!
cronEditor_format: Format: minute hour day month weekday
agentsPanel_claudeCodeGuideDesc: Agent for answering questions about Claude Code features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, and IDE integrations.
agentsPanel_exploreDesc: Fast agent specialized for exploring codebases. Use for finding files, searching code, or answering questions about the codebase.
agentsPanel_generalPurposeDesc: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks.
agentsPanel_planDesc: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Returns step-by-step plans and identifies critical files.
session_phase_cached_hint: Conversation loaded from local cache. The CLI will spawn when you send a message.
session_phase_stale_cached_hint: Snapshot loaded but may be behind. Background sync will catch up.
session_phase_syncing_hint: Catching up with latest events from the session.
slash_builtInOnlyBanner: session_init not received yet — showing built-in commands only.
settings_tab_loadFailed: Unable to load this settings panel. Please try again.
runtime_claude_capabilities: Anthropic agent with tools, plans, and project context
runtime_mimo_capabilities: Xiaomi MiMo agent with StreamJson protocol
runtime_aider_capabilities: Pair-programming CLI for git-aware edits (coming soon)
runtime_opencode_capabilities: Open-source coding agent with resumable NDJSON sessions
runtime_cursor_capabilities: Desktop IDE launcher managed as a desktop runtime
split_mode_dropHint: Drop here to add a pane
split_mode_paneLimitReached: Up to 4 panes. Close one first.
split_mode_sidebarSuspendedHint: Tool / context / file panels stop subscribing while split mode is active. Exit split to bring them back.
split_mode_layoutWouldHide: This layout has fewer slots than the current pane count.
split_mode_newContent: New content since you last viewed this pane
split_mode_readOnlyHint: Click to make this pane active and reply.
send_status_failed_transport: Couldn't reach the agent. Click to retry.
send_status_failed_rejected: Agent rejected the message. Click to retry.
send_status_failed_stale: Session changed. Open the correct session to resend.
send_status_failed_timeout: Agent didn't acknowledge in time. Click to retry.
runtime_hub_description: Detect, compare, and select the coding runtimes that power MiWarp sessions.
runtime_hub_desktop_note: Available as a desktop launcher; it is not exposed as a MiWarp chat protocol.
runtime_hub_adapter_pending: The adapter contract is reserved for a future release.
runtime_hub_install_hint: Install this CLI and refresh detection to enable it.
runtime_hub_mimo_description: Override discovery and protocol negotiation only when automatic detection is insufficient.
runtime_hub_binary_description: Leave empty to use automatic executable discovery.
runtime_hub_protocol_description: Choose how MiWarp communicates with the MiMo runtime.
runtime_control_center_description: Health, auth, provider/model state, and safe config transactions for each runtime.
runtime_config_diff_description: Review redacted diffs before applying. Failed probes roll back automatically.
runtime_config_rollback_notice: Configuration change failed and was rolled back.
runtime_diagnosis_binary_not_found_body: Install the runtime CLI and refresh detection.
protocol_quarantine_recovering: Recovering session timeline due to protocol errors…
protocol_quarantine_full_reload: Reloading session due to protocol desync…
protocol_quarantine_terminated: Session protocol desynced. Please restart the session.
protocol_desync_toast: Session state reset: too many protocol parse failures.
recovery_unrecoverable: Session could not be recovered. Retry or open diagnostics.
tasks_subtitle: Higher-level engineering work units than sessions.
tasks_empty: No tasks yet. Create one to start a worktree task lab.
tasks_reconcile_summary: Reconciled {scanned} tasks; recovered {recovered}, moved to attention {moved}, unchanged {unchanged}.
artifacts_subtitle: Reusable, verifiable engineering deliverables from agent runs.
artifacts_empty: No artifacts yet. Artifacts appear once agents finish runs.
artifacts_remove_confirm: Remove this artifact from the list?
diagnostics_subtitle: Structured trace, health, and redacted support bundles.
diagnostics_perf_none: No snapshot yet. Start the app and run a scenario to capture p50/p95.
specs_empty: No specs yet. Create a spec to anchor acceptance criteria for a task.
workbench_selectProject: Select a project to get started
workbench_projectChatComingSoon: Start a project-level session from this desk.
workbench_projectDeskHeadline: Ask MiWarp to manage this project from here.
workbench_projectDeskDescription: Use the same chat controls as a normal session, but scoped to the selected project. Start a new plan, inspect past work, or ask for the next move without leaving the workbench.
workbench_briefingActivePrompt: Act as my MiWarp project desk for {project}. Inspect the active sessions and tell me what is running, what may need supervision, and whether any work should be resumed or stopped.
workbench_modeOrientDescription: Map the workspace, missing setup, and useful next context.
workbench_modeOrientPrompt: Act as my MiWarp project desk for {project}. Orient yourself in this workspace: inspect the repo shape, current branch, important docs, project instructions, and missing setup. Then tell me the best starting point.
workbench_modeExecuteDescription: Turn the next concrete change into implementation work.
workbench_modeExecutePrompt: Act as my MiWarp project desk for {project}. Choose the next concrete implementation step, make the smallest complete code change that moves the project forward, and verify it.
workbench_modeDelegateDescription: Split work into agent-sized tasks and handoff points.
workbench_modeDelegatePrompt: Act as my MiWarp project desk for {project}. Break the current work into agent-sized tasks, identify what can run in parallel, and tell me which task should be delegated first.
workbench_modeVerifyDescription: Check the current state before trusting the project.
workbench_modeVerifyPrompt: Act as my MiWarp project desk for {project}. Verify the current project state: inspect changed files, run the relevant checks, identify unresolved risks, and tell me whether this is ready to continue.
workbench_projectDeskSystemContextHint: MiWarp injected a project-aware system prompt (~{tokens} tokens) so this session always knows your cwd, recent work, and project instructions.
workbench_projectDeskSystemContextFallba: Project context is enabled for this run, scoped to the selected cwd.
workbench_noSessionsYet: No sessions for this project yet.
workbench_onboardingTitle: Pull your workspace into the project desk
workbench_onboardingDescription: Add a project folder to start managing its sessions, risks, and pending handoffs from one console.
workbench_noProjectsHint: No projects yet — add a folder to bring its sessions here.
workbench_approvalBarTitle: Project desk is waiting for your approval
workbench_approvalBarHint: Approve or deny the inline tool below — pending handoffs block this project.
workbench_notes_subtitle: Private scratchpad saved with this project.
workbench_notes_placeholder: Jot down context, TODOs, or reminders…
workbench_profile_empty: No profile available for this project.
